name_jp: ハイクラスパック「GXバトルブースト」

box_guarantees._source: https://pokemoncard.co.kr/card/151 (Korean 20-pack, 5-card product configuration; all cards are holo cards); https://www.pokemon-card.com/products/sm/sm4p.html (Japanese GX Battle Boost source: one SR-or-higher per 10-pack box). Korean official pull rates are unpublished, so RR and second high-rarity counts are transparent estimates for the Korean REMASTER product.
